items.source: Discover every biome
items.translation: 发现所有的生物群系

items.source: Kill a Breeze with a deflected Breeze-shot Wind Charge
items.translation: 反弹旋风人的风弹来击杀旋风人

items.source: Get Armadillo Scutes from an Armadillo using a Brush
items.translation: 用刷子从犰狳身上获得犰狳鳞甲

items.source: Hit the bullseye of a Target block from at least 30 meters away
items.translation: 从至少30米外射中标靶的靶心

items.source: Free fall from the top of the world (build limit) to the bottom of the world and survive
items.translation: 从世界顶部（建筑高度限制处）自由落体，坠至世界底部并存活下来

items.source: Successfully defend a village from a raid
items.translation: 成功在袭击中保卫村庄

items.source: Jump into a Honey Block to break your fall
items.translation: 跳入蜂蜜块以缓冲摔落

items.source: Kill any hostile monster
items.translation: 杀死任意敌对性怪物

items.source: Kill one of every hostile monster
items.translation: 杀死每一种敌对性怪物

items.source: Kill a mob near a Sculk Catalyst
items.translation: 在幽匿催发体附近杀死生物

items.source: Scrape a Copper Bulb with an Axe to make it brighter
items.translation: 用斧刮削铜灯来让它变得更亮

items.source: Step foot in a Trial Chamber
items.translation: 踏入试炼密室

items.source: Deal 50 hearts of damage in a single hit using the Mace
items.translation: 使用重锤一击造成50颗心的伤害

items.source: Make the Meadows come alive with the sound of music from a Jukebox
items.translation: 用唱片机的音乐声为草甸增添生机

items.source: Brush a Suspicious block to obtain a Pottery Sherd
items.translation: 刷扫可疑的方块来获得陶片

items.source: Shoot something with an Arrow
items.translation: 用弓箭射点什么

items.source: Kill a Skeleton from at least 50 meters away
items.translation: 从至少50米外射杀一只骷髅

items.source: Look at the Ender Dragon through a Spyglass
items.translation: 透过望远镜观察末影龙

items.source: Look at a Ghast through a Spyglass
items.translation: 透过望远镜观察恶魂

items.source: Summon an Iron Golem to help defend a village
items.translation: 召唤一只铁傀儡来帮忙守卫村庄

items.source: Use a Totem of Undying to cheat death
items.translation: 利用不死图腾逃离死神

items.source: Trade with a Villager at the build height limit
items.translation: 在建筑高度限制处与村民交易

items.source: Craft trimmed armor at a Smithing Table
items.translation: 在锻造台中合成带有纹饰的盔甲

items.source: Walk on Powder Snow... without sinking in it
items.translation: 在细雪上行走……并且不陷进去

items.source: Use a Wind Charge to launch yourself upward 8 blocks
items.translation: 使用风弹将自己向上弹射8格

items.source: Give a Pillager a taste of their own medicine
items.translation: 让掠夺者也尝尝弩的滋味

items.source: Collect Dragon's Breath in a Glass Bottle
items.translation: 用玻璃瓶收集一些龙息

items.source: Find Elytra
items.translation: 找到鞘翅

items.source: Or the beginning?
items.translation: 抑或是起点？

items.source: Have an Allay drop a Cake at a Note Block
items.translation: 让悦灵向音符盒投掷一块蛋糕

items.source: Eat everything that is edible, even if it's not good for you
items.translation: 尝遍天下食材，即便是对身体不好的

items.source: Breed all the animals!
items.translation: 繁殖每种动物！

items.source: Team up with an Axolotl and win a fight
items.translation: 与美西螈并肩作战并赢得胜利

items.source: Obtain a Sniffer Egg
items.translation: 获得嗅探兽蛋

items.source: Place a Dried Ghast block into water
items.translation: 将失水恶魂方块放在水中

items.source: Plant a seed and watch it grow
items.translation: 种下种子，见证它的成长

items.source: The world is full of friends and food
items.translation: 世界无处没有朋友与美食

items.source: Move a Bee Nest or Beehive, with 3 Bees inside, using Silk Touch
items.translation: 用精准采集移动住着3只蜜蜂的蜂巢或蜂箱

items.source: Catch a Fish... without a Fishing Rod!
items.translation: 不用钓鱼竿抓住一条鱼！

items.source: Scrape Wax off of a Copper block!
items.translation: 给铜质方块脱蜡！

items.source: Tame one of each Wolf variant
items.translation: 驯服所有种类的狼

items.source: Have every potion effect applied at the same time
items.translation: 同时拥有所有药水效果

items.source: Brew a Potion
items.translation: 酿造一瓶药水

items.source: Bring a Beacon to full power
items.translation: 让一座信标发挥最大功效

items.source: Explore all Nether biomes
items.translation: 探索所有下界生物群系

items.source: Break your way into a Nether Fortress
items.translation: 闯入下界要塞

items.source: Obtain a Wither Skeleton's skull
items.translation: 获得凋灵骷髅的头颅

items.source: Bring summer clothes
items.translation: 记得带夏装

items.source: Summon the Wither
items.translation: 召唤凋灵

items.source: Rescue a Ghast from the Nether, bring it safely home to the Overworld... and then kill it
items.translation: 从下界救出一只恶魂，将其安全地带到主世界……然后干掉它

items.source: Weaken and then cure a Zombie Villager
items.translation: 弱化并治疗一名僵尸村民

items.source: Deflect a projectile with a Shield
items.translation: 用盾牌反弹一个弹射物

items.source: Enchant an item at an Enchanting Table
items.translation: 用附魔台附魔一样物品

items.source: Enter the End Portal
items.translation: 进入末地传送门

items.source: Obtain a block of Obsidian
items.translation: 获得一块黑曜石

items.source: Upgrade your Pickaxe
items.translation: 升级你的镐

items.source: Acquire diamonds
items.translation: 获得钻石

items.source: Protect yourself with a piece of iron armor
items.translation: 用铁盔甲来保护你自己

items.source: The heart and story of the game
items.translation: 游戏的核心与故事

items.source: Diamond armor saves lives
items.translation: 钻石盔甲能救人

items.source: Steve was pricked to death
items.translation: Steve被戳死了

items.source: Steve was squished too much
items.translation: Steve因被过度挤压而死

items.source: Steve was roasted in dragon's breath
items.translation: Steve被龙息烤熟了

items.source: Steve was roasted in dragon's breath by a Zombie
items.translation: Steve被僵尸的龙息烤熟了

items.source: Steve drowned while trying to escape a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在试图逃离僵尸时淹死了

items.source: Steve hit the ground too hard while trying to escape a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在试图逃离僵尸时落地过猛

items.source: Steve was squashed by a falling block
items.translation: Steve被下落的方块压扁了

items.source: Steve was fireballed by a Zombie using a Sword
items.translation: Steve被僵尸用剑发射的火球烧死了

items.source: Steve went off with a bang due to a firework fired from a Sword by a Zombie
items.translation: Steve随着僵尸用剑发射的烟花发出的巨响消失了

items.source: Steve went off with a bang while fighting a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在与僵尸战斗时随着一声巨响消失了

items.source: Steve experienced kinetic energy while trying to escape a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在试图逃离僵尸时感受到了动能

items.source: Steve died
items.translation: Steve死了

items.source: Steve died because of a Zombie
items.translation: Steve死于僵尸

items.source: Steve was killed while fighting a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在与僵尸战斗时被杀死了

items.source: Steve walked into fire while fighting a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在与僵尸战斗时不慎走入了火中

items.source: Steve was killed by a Zombie using a Sword
items.translation: Steve被僵尸用剑杀死了

items.source: Steve tried to swim in lava
items.translation: Steve试图在熔岩里游泳

items.source: Steve tried to swim in lava to escape a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在逃离僵尸时试图在熔岩里游泳

items.source: Steve was struck by lightning
items.translation: Steve被闪电击中

items.source: Steve was burned to a crisp while fighting a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在与僵尸战斗时被烤得酥脆

items.source: Steve fell out of the world
items.translation: Steve掉出了这个世界

items.source: Steve was impaled on a stalagmite
items.translation: Steve被石笋刺穿了

items.source: Steve starved to death while fighting a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在与僵尸战斗时饿死了

items.source: Steve was killed while trying to hurt a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在试图伤害僵尸时被杀

items.source: Steve was impaled by a Zombie
items.translation: Steve被僵尸刺穿了

items.source: Steve was impaled by a Zombie with a Sword
items.translation: Steve被僵尸用剑刺穿了

items.source: Steve withered away while fighting a Zombie
items.translation: Steve在与僵尸战斗时凋零了

items.source: Steve was shot by a skull from a Zombie using a Sword
items.translation: Steve被僵尸用剑发射的头颅射杀

items.source: Steve fell off some twisting vines
items.translation: Steve从缠怨藤上摔了下来

items.source: Steve fell too far and was finished by a Zombie
items.translation: Steve摔伤得太重并被僵尸完结了生命

items.source: 1 Lapis Lazuli
items.translation: 花费：1颗青金石

items.source: I want to report them
items.translation: 我想举报该玩家

items.source: I'm annoyed with them / they have done something I do not like.
items.translation: 该玩家使我恼怒或做的事情使我反感。

items.source: Someone is shaming, attacking, or bullying you or someone else. This includes when someone is repeatedly trying to contact you or someone else without consent or posting private personal information about you or someone else without consent ("doxing").
items.translation: 有人羞辱、攻击、霸凌你或其他人。这包括在未经允许的情况下不断尝试联系你或其他人，或发布你或其他人的隐私信息。

items.source:
%s

%s

Learn more at the following link: %s
items.translation:
%s

%s

点击以下链接了解更多：%s

items.source: Code: %s - %s
items.translation: 代码：%s - %s

items.source: Name Not Allowed in Multiplayer
items.translation: 多人游戏中不允许使用当前名称

items.source: References to hate groups, terrorist organizations, or notorious figures
items.translation: 推广仇恨群体、恐怖组织或不法分子

items.source: Account temporarily suspended
items.translation: 账户已被暂时封禁

items.source: Cancel
items.translation: 取消

items.source: Sharing details will help us make a well-informed decision.
items.translation: 提供详情可以帮助我们更严谨地做出决定。

items.source: Report Player Chat
items.translation: 举报玩家聊天

items.source: Search...
items.translation: 搜索…

items.source: Search...
items.translation: 搜索…

items.source: %s - %s player
items.translation: %s - %s名玩家

items.source: Show in Chat
items.translation: 在聊天中显示

items.source: This player can't be reported, because their chat messages can't be verified on this server
items.translation: 无法举报该玩家，服务器无法验证其聊天消息。

items.source:
The contents of this screen are controlled by third-party servers and maps that are not owned, operated, or supervised by Mojang Studios or Microsoft.

Handle with care! Always be careful when following links and never give away your personal information, including login details.

If this screen prevents you from playing, you can also disconnect from the current server by using the button below.
items.translation:
此屏幕的内容由第三方服务器或地图控制，不由Mojang Studios或Microsoft拥有、运营和监督。

请小心操作！点击链接时请务必谨慎，确保不要泄露你的个人信息，包括账号密码等。

如果此屏幕阻止你继续，可以点击下方按钮与当前服务器断开连接。

items.source: Back to Game
items.translation: 回到游戏

items.source: Do you really want to load this world?
items.translation: 你真的想加载此世界吗？

items.source: Data Packs
items.translation: 数据包

items.source: Delete
items.translation: 删除

items.source: size: %s MB
items.translation: 大小：%s MB

items.source: Export World Generation Settings
items.translation: 导出世界生成设置

items.source: Same as Survival Mode, locked at hardest
items.translation: 难度锁定在困难的生存模式

items.source: Explore a mysterious world where you build, collect, craft, and fight monsters.
items.translation: 探索未知的世界，尽情建造、收集、合成并与怪物战斗。

items.source: Select World
items.translation: 选择世界

items.source: Warning! These settings are using experimental features
items.translation: 警告！这些设置使用了实验性功能

items.source:
There is not much space left on your device.
Running out of disk space while in game can lead to your world being damaged.
items.translation:
设备上的存储空间不足。
运行游戏时磁盘空间不足可能会导致世界损坏。

items.source: Controls whether players are allowed to enter the Nether.
items.translation: 控制玩家能否进入下界。

items.source: Controls whether fire and lava should be able to tick further than 8 chunks away from any player.
items.translation: 控制火和熔岩能否在距离任何玩家超过8个区块处蔓延。

items.source: Some of the drops from blocks destroyed by explosions caused by block interactions are lost in the explosion.
items.translation: 在与方块交互引起的爆炸中，部分被破坏方块的掉落物会被炸毁。

items.source: The number of blocks that can be changed at once by one command, such as fill or clone.
items.translation: 单条命令（如fill和clone）最多能更改的方块数量。

items.source: Controls drops from minecarts (including inventories), item frames, boats, etc.
items.translation: 控制矿车（包括内容物）、物品展示框、船等的物品掉落。

items.source: If enabled, players will be able to craft only unlocked recipes.
items.translation: 若启用，玩家只能使用已解锁的配方合成。

items.source: Controls resource drops from blocks, including experience orbs.
items.translation: 控制破坏方块后是否掉落资源，包括经验球。

items.source: Whether Ender Pearls thrown by a player vanish when that player dies.
items.translation: 玩家投掷的末影珍珠是否在玩家死亡时消失。

items.source: Allow entities with passengers to teleport through Nether Portals, End Portals, and End Gateways.
items.translation: 允许被骑乘的实体通过下界传送门、末地传送门和末地折跃门传送。

items.source: Angered neutral mobs stop being angry when the targeted player dies nearby.
items.translation: 愤怒的中立生物将在其目标玩家于附近死亡后息怒。

items.source: When certain game events happen, like a boss spawning, the sound is heard everywhere.
items.translation: 特定游戏事件（如Boss生成）发生时，声音可在所有地方听见。

items.source: When flowing lava is surrounded on two sides by lava sources it converts into a source.
items.translation: 流动熔岩在两面与熔岩源相邻时转化为熔岩源。

items.source: When enabled, a bar is shown on the screen to indicate the direction of players.
items.translation: 启用后，屏幕上会显示指示玩家方位的定位栏。

items.source: Applies to command block chains and functions.
items.translation: 应用于命令方块链和函数。

items.source: Maximum number of contexts that can be used by commands like 'execute as'.
items.translation: “execute as”等命令可以使用的上下文数量最大值。

items.source: Maximum default speed of a moving Minecart on land.
items.translation: 矿车在地面上移动的默认最大速度。

items.source: Some of the drops from blocks destroyed by explosions caused by mobs are lost in the explosion.
items.translation: 在生物引起的爆炸中，部分被破坏方块的掉落物会被炸毁。

items.source: Time (in ticks) that a creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether portal before changing dimensions.
items.translation: 创造模式下的玩家通过下界传送门前往其他维度前需要站在其中等待的时间（以刻为单位）。

items.source: Time (in ticks) that a non-creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether portal before changing dimensions.
items.translation: 非创造模式下的玩家通过下界传送门前往其他维度前需要站在其中等待的时间（以刻为单位）。

items.source: The percentage of players who must be sleeping to skip the night.
items.translation: 跳过夜晚所需的入睡玩家占比。

items.source: Controls whether impact projectiles will destroy blocks that are destructible by them.
items.translation: 控制弹射物能否破坏可被其破坏的方块。

items.source: Controls whether players are allowed to damage other players.
items.translation: 控制玩家间能否互相伤害。

items.source: Limits contents of debug screen.
items.translation: 限制调试屏幕内容。

items.source: When it snows, layers of snow form on the ground up to at most this number of layers.
items.translation: 降雪时，地面上的雪最多堆积到此处指定的层数。

items.source: The amount of chunks that stay loaded around the overworld spawn position.
items.translation: 主世界出生点周围保持加载的区块数量。

items.source: Controls whether monsters naturally spawn.
items.translation: 控制怪物能否自然生成。

items.source: Controls the size of the area around the spawn point that players can spawn in.
items.translation: 控制适合玩家生成的出生点周围区域大小。

items.source: Some of the drops from blocks destroyed by explosions caused by TNT are lost in the explosion.
items.translation: 在TNT引起的爆炸中，部分被破坏方块的掉落物会被炸毁。

items.source: Angered neutral mobs attack any nearby player, not just the player that angered them. Works best if forgiveDeadPlayers is disabled.
items.translation: 愤怒的中立生物将攻击附近的所有玩家，而不再限于激怒它们的玩家。禁用“宽恕死亡玩家”可达到最佳效果。

items.source: When flowing water is surrounded on two sides by water sources it converts into a source.
items.translation: 流动水在两面与水源相邻时转化为水源。
